abilities.shortEffect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during hail.  Protects against hail damage.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon heals for 1/16 of its maximum HP after each turn during hail, and it does not take hail damage regardless of type.

abilities.shortEffect: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
abilities.effect:
After each turn, one of this Pokémon's stats at random rises two stages, and another falls one stage.

If a stat is already at 6 or -6 stages, it will not be chosen to be increased or decreased, respectively.
